results.evidence: route.ts:113 — when edgeResults.length >= fetchLimit (200), pgSkipped=true, searchSkills never called. Verified in production: X-Search-Source: edge for popular queries (react, python, rust). Test: edgeOnly_skipsPostgres_whenEdgeReturnsFetchLimit
route.ts:116-141 — else branch calls searchSkills with retry. Production verified: node, kubernetes return edge+postgres. Test: edgePlusPg_callsPostgres_whenEdgeBelowFetchLimit
route.ts:100-105 — catch block silently falls through to postgres path. Test: pgFallback_whenEdgeFails

route.ts:161-165 — searchSource tracks edge/postgres/edge+postgres. Set as X-Search-Source header at line 202. Production verified via curl -I. Tests: xSearchSourceHeader_exactValue_edgeOnly, xSearchSourceHeader_edgePlusPostgres
route.ts:26-28 — edgeOnly=true resolves empty Map instead of calling getBlockedSkillNames. Test: edgeOnly_skipsGetBlockedSkillNames
route.ts:26-28 — edgeOnly=false (when pg involved) calls getBlockedSkillNames normally. Test: pgPath_callsAllThreeBlocklistQueries

route.ts:30-34 — searchBlocklistEntries and searchRejectedSubmissions always called in Promise.all regardless of edgeOnly. Tests: edgeOnly_stillCallsBlocklistEntries, edgeOnly_stillCallsRejectedSubmissions
route.ts:201 — Cache-Control: public, max-age=10, s-maxage=60, stale-while-revalidate=300. Production verified via curl headers. Test: cacheControlHeader_hasStaleWhileRevalidate300
SearchPalette.tsx:279 — SWR_TTL_MS = 60_000. Test: swrTtlConstant_is60000
route.ts:201 — stale-while-revalidate=300 present in Cache-Control header. CDN will serve stale for up to 300s while revalidating. Verified in production response headers.
route.ts:195 — Server-Timing includes edge;dur=${edgeDur.toFixed(1)}. Production shows edge;dur=20.0 for warm requests. Test: serverTiming_includesEdgeDuration
route.ts:193-194 — when pgSkipped=false, includes postgres;dur=${pgDur.toFixed(1)}. Production shows postgres;dur=577.0 for kubernetes query. Test: serverTiming_includesPostgresDuration_whenPgCalled
route.ts:193 — when pgSkipped=true, includes postgres;desc="skipped";dur=0. Production verified for react query. Test: serverTiming_marksPostgresSkipped_whenEdgeOnly
route.ts:195 — enrichment;dur=${enrichDur.toFixed(1)} always present. Production shows enrichment;dur=251.0. Test: serverTiming_includesEnrichmentDuration
SearchPalette.tsx:401-403 — when trimmed.length === 0 && trendingRef.current, returns top 10 trending skills mapped to SearchResult. Test: trendingSkills_shownOnPaletteOpen_queryEmpty
SearchPalette.tsx:186 — fetch('/api/v1/stats') on mount, reads data.trendingSkills. Test: trendingSkills_shownOnPaletteOpen_queryEmpty (mocks /api/v1/stats)

SearchPalette.tsx:370-382 — mapTrendingToResult maps to same SearchResult interface used by API results. Same allItems rendering path at line 407-433. Test: trendingSkills_sameRowLayout_asSearchResults
SearchPalette.tsx:388 — when trimmed.length >= 2, returns API results directly, replacing trending. Test: trendingSkills_replacedByApiResults_atTwoChars
SearchPalette.tsx:179,185 — trendingRef.current is a useRef that persists across renders. Line 185: if (trendingRef.current) return; prevents re-fetch. Test: trendingSkills_notRefetched_onSecondOpen
SearchPalette.tsx:390-398 — 1-char query filters trendingRef.current by name/displayName prefix match using startsWith. Test: oneCharQuery_filtersClientSide_byNamePrefix
SearchPalette.tsx:388 — 2+ chars returns API results. Debounce at 271-277 clears results and fetches from API. Test: twoCharQuery_apiResultsReplaceTrending
SearchPalette.tsx:451 — showSkeletons requires query.trim().length >= 2, so 1-char queries never show skeletons. Test: oneCharQuery_noLoadingSkeleton
SearchPalette.tsx:390 — condition checks trendingRef.current is truthy; if null, falls through to return [] at line 404. Test: oneCharQuery_emptyState_whenTrendingNotLoaded

headers.X-Search-Source: edge (for popular queries like react, python, rust, docker)

loadTest.edgeOnlyHitRate: Popular queries (react, python, rust, docker, typescript) fully skip Postgres

playwrightTests.note: 5 failures are pre-existing and unrelated to search (trust tier, submission discover, state history)
